name: Easy Nutella Ice Cream Cups
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Chocolate ice cream, softened until spreadable but not melted
2 pints Coffee ice cream, softened until spreadable but not melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Have ready 8 ramekins with a 5 to 6 oz capacity.
2. Spread 1/4 cup chocolate ice cream in the bottom of each ramekin.
3. Drizzle 2 teaspoons Nutella evenly over the chocolate ice cream.
4. Spread 1/2 cup coffee ice cream in each ramekin, smoothing the top.
5. Freeze the ramekins until the coffee ice cream is firm, about 30 minutes.
6. Remove only 4 ramekins from the freezer at a time.
7. Spread a smooth layer of Nutella over the coffee ice cream.
8. Place a hazelnut in the center of each filled ramekin.
9. Freeze the ramekins just until the topping is firm, about 15 minutes.
10. Serve.
